entities.entity_name: 2.5 功能引脚信号走线长度与阻抗说明
entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚说明', this section provides detailed information about the signal trace length and impedance characteristics of functional pins, which are critical for ensuring proper electrical performance in the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the specific functional pins on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, which are discussed in relation to their signal trace length and impedance in section 2.5.
Refers to the physical length of signal traces on the board, which is a key parameter analyzed in section 2.5.
Refers to the electrical impedance of signal traces, which is an important factor in signal integrity and is discussed in section 2.5.
